title: Anti-internal Energy Revolution
description: A technological Fabric Minecraft mod about how to use ice and snow to produce power
body:
# **Anti-internal Energy Revolution**

*IMPORTANT:*

*THIS MOD HAS BEEN SEMI-ABANDONED AND MAY BE VERY PROBABLY ABANDONED COMPLETELY BECAUSE OF THE STUDIES OF THE MEMBERS OF THE TEAM. THE UPDATES CANNOT BE RELEASED STABLY BEFORE JUNE, 2024. THE TEAM HAS BEEN IN FACT DISSOLVED AND HAS STOPPED ALMOST ANY ACTIVITY BUT NOMINALLY STILL EXISTING.*

**Tips:**
- This mod needs Patchouli to run
- This mod is in a really early period, the playability is very low. The reason why to upload this mod is looking for suggestions from pros 
- My English is lame XD
## Description
Do you think we can use frozen things to produce power? Do you wanna control the powerful weapons and equipment? Do you wanna meet the scary bosses (I haven't started to add those yet)? If so, AIER can satisfy you!  
The wonderful machines, the mythical magic and the exciting weapons make you stronger and more awesome. But don't forget, the world needs you to save, bring the friendship to everywhere and beat the seven strong enemies. Then you will be a legend with glory and honor!  
This mod tributes _My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic_
## Staff Introduction
The team called AmazingRabbit is from Mainland China which was founded on April 4th, 2020. When starting this project, every members of the team was students of junior high school. Especially ARMrAmzing, he is preparing for the examination of entering a senior high school.  
But the team which is composed of these very young people have a big dream--to create a Fabric technological mod. Though the study make a great difference to the development and we take part in Teacon 2021 which is a mod developing match, we have still achieved some results.  
Because of the study, the work has been nearly paused, the updating speed are very slow, and I can't reply every question immediately. I'm so sorry about those.
### Leader
-ARMrAmzing
